title: Limitation on dealer's obligations
doc_html:
§490.1. Limitation on dealer's obligations

            In no event shall a dealer be liable to an agent pursuant to the terms of any dealer agreement between them for the gross negligence or willful misconduct of any third party.

            Acts 2015, No. 466, §1.
doc_text:
§490.1.  Limitation on dealer's obligations
In no event shall a dealer be liable to an agent pursuant to the terms of any dealer
agreement between them for the gross negligence or willful misconduct of any third party.
Acts 2015, No. 466, §1.
